chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1218 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection No.1 and 2 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 04.12.2025 Mr. Wajahat Naseem Khan, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Soofia Shaikh, advocate for the respondent Mr. Ali Zardari, AAG PI Farooq Umar PS Korangi and SIP Muhammad Younis PS Zaman Town --------- Ms. Soofia Shaikh, advocate files power on behalf of the respondent/detainee, which is taken on record. Alleged detainee Zunaira is present in Court and she submits that she has filed Suit for dissolution of marriage before the Court of XXVIIth Family Judge Karachi East. She further submits that she intends to reside with her parents. Since the alleged detainee has filed Suit for dissolution of marriage and she is not willing to join the petitioner, therefore, this petition having served its purpose is dismissed with no order as to costs. JUDGE Nadir*
